title: This devious malware scans over 300 apps to build an AI profile telling hackers which victims to target
excerpt: Malware now talks directly to its boss
content_html:
• Varonis Threat Labs uncovered Dolphin X, a powerful RAT with 329 features across 10 categories
  • Its standout “AI Profiler” ranks victims by usage and sends summaries to attackers daily
  • Malware is sold on the dark web via subscription tiers, starting at $80 per month

What if malware could talk to its operator and tell it which of the infected victims is worth paying attention to, and which not? A few years ago, this might have been science fiction but today, thanks to breakthroughs in Artificial Intelligence (AI), not only is it possible, it’s also already available on the black market.

Security researchers Varonis Threat Labs recently disclosed finding a rather revolutionary remote access trojan (RAT) called Dolphin X.

Even without advanced AI capabilities, the RAT is quite potent, acting as an infostealer, a Hidden Virtual Network Computing (HVNC), a DDoS botnet, or a loader. Just its infostealer capabilities are nothing short of impressive - it can target more than 300 applications to steal browser passwords, enterprise credentials, cryptocurrency wallet data, DevOps secrets, and different sensitive files, and it comes with 329 features split into 10 categories.

AI Profiler

However, the AI capability is the one that stunned the researchers. Called “AI Profiler”, the feature ranks victims by app usage, browsing history, and more, sending a daily summary to the attackers.

The malware is now being offered on the dark web, where other criminals can subscribe to one of three tiers. The basic tier costs $80 per month, while the top tier is around $230 per month. Lifetime subscription costs $1,140 for basic access, and goes up to $3,420 for the top tier.

"Dolphin X’s collection scope reaches well beyond browser passwords to SSH keys, cloud tokens, and DevOps credentials," Varonis said in its write-up. "On the wrong machine, a single infection could expose access to an entire production environment."

"Its use of AI is also interesting because it shows us how AI is being integrated into more cybercrime tooling."

Sead is a seasoned freelance journalist based in Sarajevo, Bosnia and Herzegovina. He writes about IT (cloud, IoT, 5G, VPN) and cybersecurity (ransomware, data breaches, laws and regulations). In his career, spanning more than a decade, he’s written for numerous media outlets, including Al Jazeera Balkans. He’s also held several modules on content writing for Represent Communications.

content_html_zh:
• Varonis 威胁实验室发现了 Dolphin X，这是一种功能强大的 RAT，具有 10 个类别的 329 项功能
  • 其出色的“AI Profiler”根据使用情况对受害者进行排名，并每天向攻击者发送摘要
  • 恶意软件通过订阅级别在暗网上出售，起价为每月 80 美元

如果恶意软件可以与其操作者对话并告诉其哪些受感染的受害者值得关注，哪些不值得关注，会怎么样？ 几年前，这可能还只是科幻小说，但今天，由于人工智能 (AI) 的突破，它不仅成为可能，而且已经在黑市上出售。

安全研究人员 Varonis Threat Labs 最近披露发现了一种相当革命性的远程访问木马 (RAT)，称为 Dolphin X。

即使没有先进的人工智能功能，RAT 也非常强大，可以充当信息窃取者、隐藏虚拟网络计算 (HVNC)、DDoS 僵尸网络或加载程序。 仅其信息窃取功能就令人印象深刻 - 它可以针对 300 多个应用程序来窃取浏览器密码、企业凭证、加密货币钱包数据、DevOps 机密和不同的敏感文件，并且它具有分为 10 个类别的 329 项功能。

人工智能分析器

然而，人工智能的能力却让研究人员感到震惊。 该功能称为“AI Profiler”，根据应用程序使用情况、浏览历史记录等对受害者进行排名，并向攻击者发送每日摘要。

该恶意软件现在在暗网上提供，其他犯罪分子可以订阅三个级别之一。 基本层的费用为每月 80 美元，而顶层的费用约为每月 230 美元。 基本访问的终身订阅费用为 1,140 美元，顶级访问的费用高达 3,420 美元。

Varonis 在其文章中表示：“Dolphin X 的收集范围远远超出了浏览器密码、SSH 密钥、云令牌和 DevOps 凭证。” “在错误的机器上，一次感染可能会暴露对整个生产环境的访问权限。”

“它对人工智能的使用也很有趣，因为它向我们展示了人工智能如何被集成到更多网络犯罪工具中。”

Sead 是波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那萨拉热窝一位经验丰富的自由记者。 他撰写有关 IT（云、物联网、5G、VPN）和网络安全（勒索软件、数据泄露、法律和法规）的文章。 在他十多年的职业生涯中，他为包括半岛电视台巴尔干半岛在内的众多媒体撰稿。 他还为 Represent Communications 举办了几个内容写作模块。
